calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Miguel Torres, via Zoom, for Kyle Devin Eisenberg, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the issue regarding proof of service showing notice mailed to different addresses. Counsel reports that he has confirmed that Gedalia Potash is the Agent for Service of Process for Chabad of Noe Valley, via the CA Secretary of State, and mailed notice to 3771 Cesar Chavez Street and that 3781 Cesar Chavez Street is the Rabbi's residence. Counsel confirms that the signature shown on the Waiver of Notice of Proposed Action filed with the court on Jul-01-2021 is that of Gedalia Potash, on behalf of Chabad of Noe Valley. Counsel and the court discuss the issue of some of the calculations in the petition being inaccurate. Counsel advises as to why and proposes submitting an updated order. The court agrees and advises counsel to submit an updated proposed order via email to the courtroom clerk by noon on Jul-06-2022. Counsel is provided with the clerk's email.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Jul-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Continued To Jun-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 26, 2018 is admitted to probate. Charles Cheever is appointed as the Administrator/Executor of the estate with full authority/limited authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 12, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by April 5, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To Apr-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
